options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -advanced_node_rule_support
options.description: {true|false} If you use this parameter, all the pin related command will use design object shapes for deciding pin location which will give accurate result but will have larger runtime.

options.name: -allow_unconnected_in_abutted_edge
options.description: {true|false} If you use this parameter, unconnected partition pin can be placed in abutted edge

options.name: -allowNonNdrNetPinsOnNdrTracks
options.description: {true|false} A true value allows general pins to be placed on ndr tracks if available. Alternately, if the value is set to false, the ndr-track rule is followed strictly and the net's pins are placed on matching ndr tracks only.

options.name: -block_boundary_macro_distance
options.description: <distanceInMicrons> This option blocks automatic pin assignment, from putting pins on the part of partition boundary facing block on layers with OBS, in the places where channel width between partition boundary and block is less than the value specified. For channel width below specified value, block all pins on boundary facing this channel on layers with OBS.

options.name: -force_abutment_with_fixed
options.description: For fixed abutted pins's connected pin, ignore soft constraints checks

options.name: -insidePinSearchDistance
options.description: To control the search distance for legalizing the internal pins

options.name: -max_distance_pairing
options.description: Ignores moving corresponding connected pins of 2-pin-connection nets where distance (in microns) between the pins is equal or greater than distance specified

options.name: -maxChannelWidthAsAbutted
options.description: <channelWidthInMicrons> If you set this parameter value then all channel less than equal to specified value will be considered as abutted and abutment rules will be applied

options.name: -maxLayer
options.description: Specifies the maximum metal layer name for partition/block pin assignment

options.name: -minLayer
options.description: Specifies the minimum metal layer name for partition/block pin assignment

options.name: -pinEditInBatch
options.description: To enable/disable pin-editing in batch mode.

options.name: -pinOffStripe
options.description: Prevents the generation of pins on metal layers with respect to the power and ground stripe

options.name: -pinToStripeDistance
options.description: {list_of_layer_distanceValue_pair} Layer specific, keep distance (in microns) from pin to stripe

options.name: -pinToViaDistanceNonPrefDirection
options.description: {list_of_layer_distanceValue_pair} Layer specific, keep distance (in microns) from pin to via-stack

options.name: -pinToViaDistancePrefDirection
options.description: {list_of_layer_distanceValue_pair}> Layer specific, keep distance (in microns) from pin to via-stack from the partition fence boundary

options.name: -promotedMacroMaxLayer
options.description: Specifies the maximum metal layer name for promoting macro pins

options.name: -promotedMacroMinLayer
options.description: Specifies the minimum metal layer name for promoting macro pins

options.name: -restrict_boundary_macro_distance
options.description: <distanceInMicrons> This option blocks automatic pin assignment, from putting pins on the part of partition boundary facing block on layers with OBS, in the places where channel width between partition boundary and block is less than the value specified. For channel width below specified value: OBS area on the layer, channel length and channel width considered to allow suitable number of pins on boundary facing this channel.

options.name: -strict_abutment
options.description: To relax abutment violations, for placing multi partition pin of a net and non neighbor pins of a net on abutted edges

options.name: -useCommonColorEngineForIO
options.description: assignIoPins command will use coloring engine api to assign mask-color to pins.
